---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(mapgl)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)

metadata_path <- here::here("data", "metadata.csv")
if (file.exists(metadata_path)) {
  photos <- read_csv(metadata_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |>
    filter(!is.na(lat), !is.na(lon))
} else {
  photos <- tibble(
    id = character(0), title = character(0), date_approx = character(0),
    reef = character(0), lat = numeric(0), lon = numeric(0),
    thumbnail_url = character(0), page_url = character(0)
  )
}

# ── Convert to sf for mapgl ────────────────────────────────────────────────
library(sf)
if (nrow(photos) > 0) {
  photos_sf <- st_as_sf(photos, coords = c("lon", "lat"), crs = 4326)
} else {
  photos_sf <- st_sf(
    id = character(0), title = character(0), date_approx = character(0),
    reef = character(0), thumbnail_url = character(0), page_url = character(0),
    geometry = st_sfc(crs = 4326)
  )
}

# ── Render map ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
m <- maplibre(
  style  = carto_style("positron"),
  center = c(118, 5),
  zoom   = 3,
  width = "100vw"
)

if (nrow(photos_sf) > 0) {
  m <- m |>
    add_source(
      id      = "photos",
      data    = photos_sf,
      cluster = TRUE,
      cluster_max_zoom = 14,
      cluster_radius   = 50
    ) |>
    # ── Cluster circles ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    add_circle_layer(
      id           = "clusters",
      source       = "photos",
      filter       = list("has", "point_count"),
      circle_color = "#2A7F7F",
      circle_radius = list(
        "step",
        list("get", "point_count"),
        15,   # radius when count < 10
        10,  20,  # radius when count < 50
        50,  25   # radius when count >= 50
      ),
      circle_opacity = 0.8
    ) |>
    # ── Cluster count labels ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    add_symbol_layer(
      id        = "cluster-count",
      source    = "photos",
      filter    = list("has", "point_count"),
      text_field = list("get", "point_count_abbreviated"),
      text_color = "#ffffff",
      text_size  = 13
    ) |>
    # ── Individual points ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    add_circle_layer(
      id              = "unclustered",
      source          = "photos",
      filter          = list("!", list("has", "point_count")),
      circle_color    = "#2A7F7F",
      circle_radius   = 6,
      circle_opacity  = 0.7,
      circle_stroke_width = 1.5,
      circle_stroke_color = "#2A7F7F",
      popup = "title"   # simple fallback; see note below
    )
}

m
```
